mapper.sql: select p.id, p.location_id, l.name as location_name, p.name, p.nickname, p.gender, p.age, p.breed, p.color, p.personality, p.status, p.found_date, p.found_location, p.last_seen_date, p.last_seen_location, cast(p.frequent_locations as char) as frequent_locations, p.main_image, cast(p.images as char) as images, p.heat_score, p.like_count, p.comment_count, p.photo_count, p.follow_count, p.created_at, p.updated_at from pets p left join locations l on l.id = p.location_id
mapper.insert: insert into pets ( location_id, name, nickname, gender, age, breed, color, personality, status, found_date, found_location, last_seen_date, last_seen_location, frequent_locations, main_image, images, photo_count ) values ( #{locationId}, #{name}, #{nickname}, #{gender}, #{age}, #{breed}, #{color}, #{personality}, #{status}, #{foundDate}, #{foundLocation}, #{lastSeenDate}, #{lastSeenLocation}, #{frequentLocations}, #{mainImage}, #{images}, #{photoCount} )
mapper.update: update pets set location_id = #{locationId}, name = #{name}, nickname = #{nickname}, gender = #{gender}, age = #{age}, breed = #{breed}, color = #{color}, personality = #{personality}, status = #{status}, found_date = #{foundDate}, found_location = #{foundLocation}, last_seen_date = #{lastSeenDate}, last_seen_location = #{lastSeenLocation}, frequent_locations = #{frequentLocations}, main_image = #{mainImage}, images = #{images}, photo_count = #{photoCount}, updated_at = sysdate() where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select (select count(1) from adoption_applications where pet_id = #{id}) + (select count(1) from comments where pet_id = #{id}) + (select count(1) from daily_rankings where pet_id = #{id}) + (select count(1) from follows where pet_id = #{id}) + (select count(1) from growth_timeline where pet_id = #{id}) + (select count(1) from health_records where pet_id = #{id}) + (select count(1) from photos where pet_id = #{id}) + (select count(1) from posts where pet_id = #{id})
select id, name from locations order by name asc
